# DU(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  du — estimate disk usage

## SYNOPSIS
  du [-sh] [path]

## DESCRIPTION
Shows disk space used by files and directories.

## OPTIONS
  -s  summarize total
  -h  human-readable sizes

## EXAMPLES
  du -sh /home/ghost
  du /var/log

## SEE ALSO
  df, ls, find
